name: Dr. Dhilipkumar Panneer Selvam
experience: 2 Years at PSNA College of Engineering and Technology; currently Associate Professor at Sri Shakthi Institute of Engineering and Technology.
officeLocation: Department of VLSI Design and Technology, SIET
message: Welcome to the Department of VLSI Design and Technology. Our department is committed to providing quality education, fostering innovation, and preparing students to excel in the rapidly evolving semiconductor industry. We emphasize strong academic foundations, practical learning, research, and industry exposure to develop skilled and responsible engineers.
